candidate.completion: set me up with your group chat; I can take a hint in stereo.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please set me up with your group chat; I can take a hint in stereo.

evaluation.rationale: The turn is clear: a plea for connection flips into a self-aware request for collective rejection, and "take a hint in stereo" supplies the snap. But the group-chat-to-stereo link feels slightly strained, so the line lands as clever more than exact.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
